name: Pancreatic Cancer - Elevated CA 19-9 Query
description: Tests ability to find pancreatic cancer patients via elevated CA 19-9 tumor marker (>100 U/mL is highly suggestive; normal <37 U/mL). Includes Path D (elevated CA 19-9 without formal pancreatic cancer dx).
prompt: Find patients with elevated CA 19-9 tumor marker results greater than 100 U/mL.

prompts.broad: Find patients with CA 19-9 (cancer antigen 19-9) measurements above 100 U/mL — highly suggestive of pancreatic cancer (also elevated in cholangiocarcinoma and pancreatitis).
prompts.expert: Search Observation resources with LOINC 24108-3 (Cancer Ag 19-9) where value-quantity > 100 U/mL. Query: Observation?code=http://loinc.org|24108-3&value-quantity=gt100||U/mL

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with elevated CA 19-9 (>100). Includes Path D (no formal dx).

required_codes.display: Cancer Ag 19-9 [Units/volume] in Serum or Plasma
